title: The Pibbleton Poisoner
description: When the village's most disliked man drops dead at the Christmas carol concert, half of Lower Pibbleton has a motive and the other half has an opinion. Retired schoolmistress Tilly Marsh would rather it were an accident — but the church urn tells a different story. A festive cozy mystery with mulled wine, secrets, and a great deal of knitting.
